# ADR-NNNN: <short decision title>

> Architecture Decision Record. Copy to `docs/adr/NNNN-title.md`, fill in, commit
> it next to the code so the "why" lives with the codebase (*Worst Habits* §9.7).

- **Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Superseded by ADR-XXXX
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Deciders:** <names / roles>

## Context
What problem are we solving? What constraints apply (landscape, Clean Core,
performance, deadline)? What forces are in tension?

## Decision
We will <do X>. Use <approach/pattern/API>. Reject <alternative> because <reason>.

## Alternatives considered
- **Option A** — pros / cons.
- **Option B** — pros / cons.

## Consequences
- Positive: …
- Negative / trade-offs: …
- Follow-ups / new ADRs this may trigger: …
